title: senecio micropifolius
intro: Senecio micropifolius, also known as the Small Leaf Ragwort, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family native to the mountainous regions of southern Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Senecio micropifolius include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, or as a topical ointment or cream for external use.
